description: This file defines a FocusTrap class used to manage focus within a specified DOM element, typically for accessibility purposes. It includes methods to activate and deactivate the focus trap, handling focus events and keydown events to ensure focus remains within the trap element.

classes.name: FocusTrap
classes.description: A class that manages trapping focus within a specified DOM element, with methods to activate and deactivate the focus trap, and handle focus and keydown events.

methods.name: activate
methods.description: Activates the focus trap, setting focus to the trap element if autofocus is enabled, and attaching event listeners for focusin and keydown events.

methods.name: deactivate
methods.description: Deactivates the focus trap, removing event listeners.

methods.name: _handleFocusin
methods.description: Handles focusin events to ensure focus remains within the trap element, redirecting focus if necessary.

methods.name: _handleKeydown
methods.description: Handles keydown events to detect Tab key presses and determine navigation direction.
